title: Underworld Overlord
description: Rise up as a fallen hero in the frozen depths of the underworld. Command armies of dead while channeling spiritual powers to fight through waves of tormented souls across cursed realms. Harvest essence from fallen enemies to grow stronger each run, unlock devastating abilities, spells, and weapons as you ascend from forgotten wretch to become the Underworld Overlord. Based on authentic spiritual literature, experience an afterlife unlike any game before.

features.title: Army Building
features.desc: Raise and command fallen enemies in strategic combat

features.title: Roguelike Progression
features.desc: Endless replayability with new builds and strategies each run

features.title: Domination Rankings
features.desc: Prove your mastery and claim rewards worthy of an overlord

features.title: Damned Realms
features.desc: Uncover the dark mysteries of the spiritual underworld
